title: Braised Venezuelan Beef Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew originating from Venezuela, made with tender beef and rich tomato sauce.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the beef on all sides, about 5 minutes. Remove from pot and set aside.
Add garlic and onion to pot, sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add cumin and cook for 1 minute.
Add tomatoes and cook for 2 minutes.
Add beef broth and bring to a boil.
Return beef to pot and cover.
Transfer pot to oven and braise at 300°F for 2 hours.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
